The food industry is extensive and will continue to grow steadily in the coming years, making food companies attractive for takeovers. Consolidation of customers, economies of scale and access to innovative products are important drivers for acquisitions. High investments, on the other hand, require wealthy buyers.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: Show all authors. The food industry is extensive and will continue to grow steadily in the coming years, making food companies attractive for takeovers. Consolidation of customers, economies of scale and access to innovative products are important drivers for acquisitions. High investments, on the other hand, require wealthy buyers. In 2025, the food industry will account for almost a quarter of the total Dutch industrial production value.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: The food industry is extensive and will continue to grow steadily in the coming years, making food companies attractive for takeovers. Consolidation of customers, economies of scale and access to innovative products are important drivers for acquisitions. High investments, on the other hand, require wealthy buyers. In 2025, the food industry will account for almost a quarter of the total Dutch industrial production value. ABN AMRO expects a volume increase of 1.5 percent for the sector in 2025, driven by volume growth at home and abroad.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: Consolidation of customers, economies of scale and access to innovative products are important drivers for acquisitions. High investments, on the other hand, require wealthy buyers. In 2025, the food industry will account for almost a quarter of the total Dutch industrial production value. ABN AMRO expects a volume increase of 1.5 percent for the sector in 2025, driven by volume growth at home and abroad. In 2026 and 2027, the sector is expected to grow by 0.5 and 1 percent respectively.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: High investments, on the other hand, require wealthy buyers. In 2025, the food industry will account for almost a quarter of the total Dutch industrial production value. ABN AMRO expects a volume increase of 1.5 percent for the sector in 2025, driven by volume growth at home and abroad. In 2026 and 2027, the sector is expected to grow by 0.5 and 1 percent respectively. Domestic demand for food and beverages increased in 2025 due to an increase in purchasing power.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: In 2025, the food industry will account for almost a quarter of the total Dutch industrial production value. ABN AMRO expects a volume increase of 1.5 percent for the sector in 2025, driven by volume growth at home and abroad. In 2026 and 2027, the sector is expected to grow by 0.5 and 1 percent respectively. Domestic demand for food and beverages increased in 2025 due to an increase in purchasing power. This volume increase was mainly noticeable in the supermarket channel.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: ABN AMRO expects a volume increase of 1.5 percent for the sector in 2025, driven by volume growth at home and abroad. In 2026 and 2027, the sector is expected to grow by 0.5 and 1 percent respectively. Domestic demand for food and beverages increased in 2025 due to an increase in purchasing power. This volume increase was mainly noticeable in the supermarket channel. The demand for specific product groups such as beef, chocolate and coffee is under pressure as a result of significant price increases.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: In 2026 and 2027, the sector is expected to grow by 0.5 and 1 percent respectively. Domestic demand for food and beverages increased in 2025 due to an increase in purchasing power. This volume increase was mainly noticeable in the supermarket channel. The demand for specific product groups such as beef, chocolate and coffee is under pressure as a result of significant price increases. Exports also developed positively, despite trade barriers and competition from other producing countries.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: Domestic demand for food and beverages increased in 2025 due to an increase in purchasing power. This volume increase was mainly noticeable in the supermarket channel. The demand for specific product groups such as beef, chocolate and coffee is under pressure as a result of significant price increases. Exports also developed positively, despite trade barriers and competition from other producing countries. For next year, ABN AMRO expects food inflation to normalize after years of high price increases.

text: High investments make transfers within family businesses challenging. The food industry is extensive with a production value of 114 billion euros. metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: The food industry is extensive with a production value of 114 billion euros. In addition, turnover growth is relatively stable, although in Western Europe it is driven more by price increases than by volume growth. Because the food market is saturated, competition is fierce and margins are under pressure. Customers of food companies are therefore looking for scale and are becoming increasingly larger. The capital intensity of food companies is also high and is increasing further due to the growing need for automation and robotization.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: In addition, turnover growth is relatively stable, although in Western Europe it is driven more by price increases than by volume growth. Because the food market is saturated, competition is fierce and margins are under pressure. Customers of food companies are therefore looking for scale and are becoming increasingly larger. The capital intensity of food companies is also high and is increasing further due to the growing need for automation and robotization. A certain scale and a lot of capital are required to enable cost reductions and investments and thus maintain relevance.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: Because the food market is saturated, competition is fierce and margins are under pressure. Customers of food companies are therefore looking for scale and are becoming increasingly larger. The capital intensity of food companies is also high and is increasing further due to the growing need for automation and robotization. A certain scale and a lot of capital are required to enable cost reductions and investments and thus maintain relevance. This makes business succession difficult within smaller family businesses.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: The capital intensity of food companies is also high and is increasing further due to the growing need for automation and robotization. text: This makes business succession difficult within smaller family businesses. If a company remains in the family, there are various arrangements to make the transfer possible. text: If a company remains in the family, there are various arrangements to make the transfer possible. The Transfer Scheme (DSR) and Business Succession Scheme (BOR) are often used. Family statutes can provide a solution when making agreements within the family regarding the family business. text: Private Equity was also part of the transaction for the remainder. Takeover processes put a lot of pressure on management. The transfer of a company is a complex process and involves several phases. metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: A quarter of the takeover targets belonged to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), companies with a turnover of less than 50 million euros per year. Takeover processes put a lot of pressure on management. The transfer of a company is a complex process and involves several phases. First, a so-called information memorandum is drawn up and potential buyers are approached, after which the due diligence follows and, if successful, the purchase agreement is concluded. In addition to economies of scale, access to certain customers, innovation or expansion of the range can be an important motivation.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: Takeover processes put a lot of pressure on management. The transfer of a company is a complex process and involves several phases. First, a so-called information memorandum is drawn up and potential buyers are approached, after which the due diligence follows and, if successful, the purchase agreement is concluded. In addition to economies of scale, access to certain customers, innovation or expansion of the range can be an important motivation. A buy-and-build strategy, in which a company is purchased and subsequent acquisitions are made, is often followed with Private Equity.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: The transfer of a company is a complex process and involves several phases. First, a so-called information memorandum is drawn up and potential buyers are approached, after which the due diligence follows and, if successful, the purchase agreement is concluded. In addition to economies of scale, access to certain customers, innovation or expansion of the range can be an important motivation. A buy-and-build strategy, in which a company is purchased and subsequent acquisitions are made, is often followed with Private Equity. For example, Group of Butchers was expanded in the past decade with specialized meat companies and Signature Foods did the same in salads and convenience.

text: For example, Group of Butchers was expanded in the past decade with specialized meat companies and Signature Foods did the same in salads and convenience. Particularly in smaller companies and startups, detailed information is often lacking about, for example, contribution margin, price and volume developments per product and per production location. metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: This process often puts a lot of pressure on management. Particularly in smaller companies and startups, detailed information is often lacking about, for example, contribution margin, price and volume developments per product and per production location. In addition, there is often a difference between the seller's expected value and the value that buyers are willing to pay. Market growth, financial performance, competitive position and risk projections play an important role in that valuation. Finally, emotional and cultural factors play an important role, especially in family businesses.

metadata.source_title: Food companies remain attractive for acquisition

text: Particularly in smaller companies and startups, detailed information is often lacking about, for example, contribution margin, price and volume developments per product and per production location. In addition, there is often a difference between the seller's expected value and the value that buyers are willing to pay. Market growth, financial performance, competitive position and risk projections play an important role in that valuation. Finally, emotional and cultural factors play an important role, especially in family businesses. The sales process can be mentally difficult for the entrepreneur, especially if they have to work under the supervision of another person after the sale.

text: Finally, emotional and cultural factors play an important role, especially in family businesses.
